title: Local AI Agents Masterclass (Gemma 4 + OpenCode + Odysseus tutorial)
summary: Tutorial on running two types of local AI agents: Odysseus as a workspace agent and OpenCode as a build agent, both executed privately on personal hardware. Shows setup using Docker, Gemma 4 model via Ollama, Venice API fallback, and a strategy of building with frontier models while executing with local ones.
writeup: The tutorial walks through running two local AI agents privately on personal hardware: Odysseus as a workspace agent and OpenCode as a build agent. Setup covers Docker, the Gemma 4 model served through Ollama, and a Venice API fallback for when local inference falls short. The core strategy: build with frontier models while executing with local ones, which keeps execution private and on-device.
